name: Neon
author: DeterMination (BEK)
description: All-in-one QoL toolkit: map editing, minimap, radial build, pinyin search, stealth path, tripwire alert, screenshot, projector overlay, logistics monitor, hotkeys, player database, patch viewer, marker, server translator, poly AI, advanced replace, mod updater, and Random. / 全能辅助模组集：地图编辑、小地图、圆盘菜单、拼音搜索、偷袭小道、地理围栏、截图、投影覆盖、物流监控、快捷键、玩家数据库、补丁查看器、自定义标记、服务器翻译、Poly AI、高级替换、模组更新和随机化。
